problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
hypothesis: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Sleep-dependent. Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
